title: Project Management Team Lead | Contract & No Bonus
description:
Company Overview

Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.

Job Summary

Manage and lead IT projects and teams to deliver solutions that meet business objectives, quality standards, and timelines. Drive project execution, coordinate resources, and report progress to senior management while fostering team development and performance evaluation.

Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage project teams by providing guidance, coaching, and support to achieve project goals and maintain high performance
  • Develop, maintain, and adjust project schedules to ensure timely delivery of project milestones and objectives
  • Delegate tasks effectively to team members to optimize resource utilization and project outcomes
  • Manage specific aspects of projects or smaller projects to meet defined business objectives and quality standards
  • Report project progress, risks, and issues clearly and regularly to the Delivery Manager or senior management
  • Evaluate team members’ performance to support continuous improvement and professional growth

Required competencies and certifications

  • Certification in Certified IT Project Manager (CITPM) or Project Management Professional (PMP)
  • At least 7 years of experience in project management and IT delivery, including a minimum of 3 years in a team leadership role
  • Strong understanding and application of project management methodologies such as Agile and Waterfall
  • Technical skills in one or more of the technologies such as AWS, Azure, Linux/Windows operating systems, MS SQL, Docker containerization, Azure DevOps, and Cloud Technical Architecture
  • Effective communication skills to engage stakeholders and facilitate collaboration across teams
  • Stakeholder management abilities to align project objectives with business needs and expectations

Other Information

  • Employment type: Contract - 2 years (renewable)
  • Location: Novena, Singapore
  • Working Hours: 8:30AM to 6:00PM (Mon-Fri)
  • Salary: $8000 - 9500
  • Working Arrangement: Full Onsite

By submitting your application, you acknowledge and agree that your personal data will be collected, used, and retained in accordance with our Privacy Policy. This information will be used solely for recruitment and employment purposes.
